attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
1 AS BATCH_ID,
COALESCE(OBJECT_ID, -999) as OBJECT_ID,
OPTY_ID,
COALESCE(OPTY_NUMBER, 'UNKNOWN') as OPTY_NUMBER,
NVL(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(OPTY_NAME,CHR(10),''),CHR(0),''),CHR(2),''),CHR(3),''),CHR(4),''),CHR(5),''),CHR(6),''),CHR(7),''),'UNKNOWN') as OPTY_NAME,
COALESCE(CREATED_ON,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) as CREATED_ON,
COALESCE(CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) as UPDATED_ON,
COALESCE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(UPDATED_BY,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),'UNKNOWN') AS UPDATED_BY,
APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,
DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE,
REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG,
null as PROD_SALES_PATH,
SERV_SALES_PATH,
'1900-01-01 00:00:00' as FIRST_INSTALLATION_DT,
null as MDM_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE,
VERTICAL_MARKET,
null as MDM_PROD_VALUE,
null as MDM_SERV_VALUE,
'3500-01-01 00:00:00' as DM_UPDATE_DATE,
null as QF_FORM_ID,
OREPLACE(OREPLACE(REOPEN_REASON,CHR(13),''),CHR(10),' ') as REOPEN_REASON,
null as QF_FORM_STATUS,
null as DDA_DEAL_DURATION,
'3500-01-01 00:00:00' as LAST_APPROVAL_DATE,
DEAL_DURATION,
DEAL_TYPE,
DEAL_TYPE_NAME,
null as DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE,
DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME,
EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,
ACTIVE_WORKFLOW,
MDM_DEAL_STATUS,
MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE,
0 as PDR_PROD_VALUE,
0 as PDR_SERV_VALUE,
SFDC_OPTY_ID,
null as QUOTE_FLAG,
null as DEAL_OR_QUOTE,
null as PDR_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE,
SFDC_ACTIVE_FLAG,
COALESCE(DEAL_OBJECT_ID, -999) as DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
DEAL_SCOPE,
DEAL_SCOPE_NAME,
null as MERGED_SFDC_OPTY_ID,
null as OPTY_STATUS,
null as CREATOR_PAE_USER_ID,
null as CDP_FLAG,
null as LEGACY_FLAG,
null as RFP_FLAG,
NULL as  MDM_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_DESC,
null as BUSINESS_SCENARIO,
null as PUBLISH_DISCOUNT_FLAG,
null as DEAL_SOURCE,
null as DEAL_SOURCE_NAME,
null as CUSTOMER_USE_CASE,
null as CUSTOMER_USE_SOLUTION,
SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLAG,
MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME,
null as PROGRAM_NAME,
SUBMIT_DATE,
FINAL_BAND,
null as FINANCIAL_SUMMARY,
null as SOURCE_OPTY_NUMBER,
CREATED_ON as CREATE_DATETIME,
'I' as ACTION_CODE,
null as AUTO_CS_QUOTE,
OWNER_CEC_ID,
OWNER_FORECAST_POSITION,
REOPEN_REASON_DESC,
DEAL_INTENT,
OPPTY_DEAL_ID
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_DEAL_RNWL_KAFKA
where EDW_CREATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_ST_INT_CQ_DEAL_RNWL_KAFKA')
